sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90655" key="profa/neia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προφάν-εια</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n90655.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eminence, distinction</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:181:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">181.33</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.), al.</sense> </entryFree>
